title: Dispersive decay for the Inter-critical nonlinear Schrödinger equation in $\mathbb{R}^3$
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2411.01466 by other authors
summary: This paper investigates the Cauchy problem for the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLS) in the mass-supercritical and energy-subcritical regime within three spatial dimensions. For initial data in the critical homogeneous Sobolev space $\dot{H}^{s_c}(\mathbb{R}^3)$ (where $s_c = \frac{5}{6}$), we get a uniform decay estimate for the long-time dynamics of solutions, which extends the previous results.

AI.tldr: 该论文在三维空间中研究了质量超临界、能量亚临界非线性薛定谔方程的柯西问题，获得了临界齐次Sobolev空间中解的长时动力学一致衰减估计。
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中质量超临界、能量亚临界非线性薛定谔方程的柯西问题，关注临界齐次Sobolev空间中的初始数据，旨在理解解的长时动力学行为并建立衰减估计。
AI.techniques: 使用非线性薛定谔方程理论、齐次Sobolev空间分析、长时动力学分析、衰减估计方法，可能涉及散射理论、Strichartz估计和能量方法。
AI.main_theorems: 对于初始数据在临界齐次Sobolev空间 $\dot{H}^{s_c}(\mathbb{R}^3)$（其中 $s_c = \frac{5}{6}$）中的解，获得了长时动力学的一致衰减估计，扩展了先前的结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性薛定谔方程在临界正则性下的衰减理论，为理解质量超临界、能量亚临界区域中解的渐近行为提供了新工具，对散射理论和长时动力学研究有重要意义。

title: On a Hamilton-Jacobi PDE theory for hydrodynamic limit of action minimizing collective dynamics
summary:
We establish multi-scale convergence theory for a class of Hamilton-Jacobi PDEs in space of probability measures. They arise from context of hydrodynamic limit of N-particle deterministic action minimizing (global) Lagrangian dynamics.
  From a Lagrangian point of view, this can also be viewed as a limit result on two scale convergence of action minimizing probability-measure-valued paths. However, we focus on the Hamiltonian formulation here mostly. We derive and study convergence of the associated abstract but scalar Hamilton-Jacobi equations, defined in space of probability measures. There is an infinite dimensional singular averaging structure within these equations. We develop an indirect variational approach to apply finite dimensional weak K.A.M. theory to such infinite dimensional setting here. With a weakly interacting particle assumption, the averaging step only involves that of individual particles, which is implicitly but rigorously treated using the weak K.A.M. theory. Consequently, we can close the above mentioned averaging step by identifying limiting Hamiltonian, and arrive at a rigorous convergence result on solutions of the nonlinear PDEs in space of probability measures.
  In technical development parts of the paper, we devise new viscosity solution techniques regarding projection of equations with a submetry structure in state space, multi-scale convergence for certain abstract Hamilton-Jacobi equations in metric spaces, as well as comparison principles for equations in space of probability measures. The space of probability measure we consider is a special case of Alexandrov metric space with curvature bounded from below. Since some results are better explained in such metric space setting, we also develop some techniques in the general settings which are of independent interests.

AI.tldr: 建立了概率测度空间中一类Hamilton-Jacobi PDE的多尺度收敛理论
AI.motivation: 研究N粒子确定性作用最小化拉格朗日动力学的流体力学极限，从概率测度值路径的角度理解多尺度收敛问题
AI.techniques: 间接变分方法、有限维弱KAM理论向无限维推广、新的粘性解技术、子度量结构投影、度量空间中抽象Hamilton-Jacobi方程的多尺度收敛、比较原理
AI.main_theorems: 建立了概率测度空间中Hamilton-Jacobi PDE的多尺度收敛理论，识别了极限哈密顿量，得到了非线性PDE解的严格收敛结果
AI.significance: 将有限维弱KAM理论推广到无限维概率测度空间，发展了处理无限维奇异平均结构的新方法，对平均场极限和流体力学极限理论有重要贡献

title: Infinitely many solutions and asymptotics for resonant oscillatory problems
summary: For a class of oscillatory resonant problems, involving Dirichlet problems for semilinear PDE's on balls and rectangles in $R^n$, we show the existence of infinitely many solutions, and study the global solution set. The first harmonic of the right hand side is not required to be zero, or small. We also derive asymptotic formulas in terms of the first harmonic of solutions, and illustrate their accuracy by numerical computations. The numerical method is explained in detail.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一类振荡共振问题，证明了球和矩形区域上半线性PDE Dirichlet问题存在无穷多解，并研究了全局解集。
AI.motivation: 研究一类振荡共振问题，涉及R^n中球和矩形区域上半线性PDE的Dirichlet问题，不要求右端项的第一谐波为零或很小，旨在证明无穷多解的存在性并分析全局解集。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法推导解的渐近公式，结合数值计算方法验证公式精度，详细解释了数值方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了无穷多解的存在性，推导了基于第一谐波的解的渐近公式，并通过数值计算验证了公式的准确性。
AI.significance: 扩展了共振问题的理论结果，提供了处理非零第一谐波情况的新方法，为振荡共振问题的数值计算提供了理论基础。

title: Uniqueness for the Homogeneous Landau-Coulomb Equation in $L^{3/2}$
summary: We prove the uniqueness of $H$-solutions to the homogeneous Landau-Coulomb equation satisfying $\langle v \rangle^{k_0} f \in C([0, T]; L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3))$ and $\langle v \rangle^{-3/2} \nabla_v ((\langle v \rangle^{k_0} f)^{3/4}) \in L^2((0, T) \times \mathbb{R}^3)$ for any $k_0 \geq 5$. In particular, this shows that the solutions constructed in~\cite{GGL25} are unique. The present work thus completes the global well-posedness theory in the critical space $L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3)$. Our proof is part of a broader effort to use the $\mathcal{M}$-operator technique developed in~\cite{AGS2025, AMSY2020} to establish the uniqueness of rough solutions to nonlinear kinetic equations. When applied to the space-homogeneous case, the $\mathbb{M}$-operator can be taken simply as a Bessel potential operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了齐次Landau-Coulomb方程在临界空间$L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3)$中$H$-解的唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究Landau-Coulomb方程在临界空间中的全局适定性问题，特别是解决GGL25中构造的解的唯一性问题，完善该方程在$L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3)$空间中的适定性理论
AI.techniques: 使用$\mathcal{M}$-算子技术（源自AGS2025和AMSY2020），在空间齐次情况下将$\mathbb{M}$-算子取为Bessel位势算子，结合加权Sobolev空间估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了满足$\langle v \rangle^{k_0} f \in C([0, T]; L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3))$和$\langle v \rangle^{-3/2} \nabla_v ((\langle v \rangle^{k_0} f)^{3/4}) \in L^2((0, T) \times \mathbb{R}^3)$（$k_0 \geq 5$）的$H$-解的唯一性
AI.significance: 完成了Landau-Coulomb方程在临界空间$L^{3/2}(\mathbb{R}^3)$中的全局适定性理论，为非线性动理学方程粗糙解的唯一性研究提供了新的技术框架

title: Quantitative bounds for Hölder exponents in the Krylov--Safonov and Evans--Krylov theories
summary: We establish quantitative bounds for Hölder exponents in the Krylov--Safonov and Evans--Krylov theories when the ellipticity ratio is close to one. Our analysis relies on the Ishii--Lions method for the Krylov--Safonov theory and a Schauder-type perturbation argument for the Evans--Krylov theory.

AI.tldr: 建立了当椭圆率接近1时Krylov-Safonov和Evans-Krylov理论中Hölder指数的定量界
AI.motivation: 研究椭圆偏微分方程正则性理论中的定量估计问题，特别关注椭圆率接近1时Hölder连续性的定量控制，这对于理解方程解在接近退化情况下的行为具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用Ishii-Lions方法处理Krylov-Safonov理论，采用Schauder型摄动论证处理Evans-Krylov理论，结合椭圆率接近1的特殊情况进行分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了当椭圆率接近1时Krylov-Safonov和Evans-Krylov理论中Hölder指数的定量界，给出了明确的定量估计公式。
AI.significance: 为椭圆偏微分方程正则性理论提供了重要的定量结果，特别在椭圆率接近退化的情况下，这些定量界对于理解解的渐近行为和数值分析具有重要意义。

title: Calderón-Zygmund gradient estimates for $p$-Laplace systems with BMO complex coefficients
summary: This work is concerned with global gradient bounds for a class of divergence-form degenerate elliptic systems with complex-valued coefficients. Notably, the leading coefficients are merely required to be sufficiently small in BMO, which is strictly weaker than the VMO condition. In the complex setting, the well-posedness of this problem was recently investigated in [W. Kim, M. Vestberg, Existence, uniqueness and regularity for elliptic $p$-Laplace systems with complex coefficients,arXiv:2503.18932], where the authors established a strong accretivity condition on the leading coefficients, and this structural condition allows them to derive Schauder-type estimates for weak solutions. In our study, it has already been observed that gaining existence and uniqueness of weak solutions is possible under a natural and less restrictive assumption on the complex-valued coefficients. Following this direction, we prove a global Caderón-Zygmund-type estimate for weak solutions, from which the Morrey-space regularity follows as a consequence. This paper is a contribution to the better understanding of solution behavior and may be viewed as part of a series of works aimed at extending regularity theory in the complex-valued setting.

AI.tldr: 在BMO系数足够小的条件下，建立了散度型退化椭圆系统的全局梯度估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有复值系数的散度型退化椭圆系统的全局梯度估计问题，特别关注系数仅需满足BMO小性条件（弱于VMO条件）的情况，这是对复值系数椭圆系统正则性理论的扩展。
AI.techniques: 使用Calderón-Zygmund型估计方法，结合BMO空间理论，在弱于强正定性条件的自然假设下分析复值系数系统的正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了弱解的全局Calderón-Zygmund型估计，并由此推导出Morrey空间正则性，在系数仅需BMO小性条件下建立了梯度估计。
AI.significance: 扩展了复值系数椭圆系统的正则性理论，为理解解的行为提供了新工具，是复值系数偏微分方程研究系列工作的重要进展。

title: A Unified Truncation Method for Infinitely Many Solutions Without Symmetry
summary:
This paper establishes the existence of infinitely many solutions for nonlinear problems without any symmetry, achieving three major advances. First, in the setting of semilinear elliptic PDEs, we introduce a refined variational truncation method that yields infinite sequences of positive as well as negative solutions. Second and most notably, we resolve a long-standing and difficult problem for nonvariational elliptic PDEs with gradient dependence. By combining our truncation method with an iterative scheme, we prove, for the first time, the existence of infinitely many solutions for this class of PDEs. Third, we overcome a central difficulty for periodic Hamiltonian systems on the real line: we show that the multiplicity of solutions, constructed on a sequence of finite intervals, survives in the limit; in other words, no collapse occurs, and we obtain multiple distinct solutions on the whole real line.
  The core novelty lies in a carefully designed truncation methodology that systematically separates solutions and remains effective across variational and non-variational PDEs as well as infinite dimensional dynamical systems. This unified perspective provides a robust and versatile tool for addressing multiplicity problems in the absence of symmetry.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种精细的截断方法，首次在无对称性条件下为变分和非变分椭圆PDE以及无穷维动力系统建立了无穷多解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 解决非线性问题中缺乏对称性时多重解存在的长期难题，特别是针对非变分椭圆PDE（含梯度项）和周期Hamilton系统在实线上的解的多重性问题。
AI.techniques: 精细变分截断方法、迭代方案、有限区间构造与极限过程分析、解的系统性分离技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 半线性椭圆PDE存在无穷多正解和负解；2) 首次证明含梯度项的非变分椭圆PDE存在无穷多解；3) 证明周期Hamilton系统在实线上存在多重不同解且无解坍塌现象。
AI.significance: 为无对称性非线性问题提供了统一的处理框架，解决了非变分PDE多重解存在的长期难题，建立了变分与非变分问题之间的桥梁，具有广泛的理论和应用价值。

title: Equilibrium Configurations and their Uniqueness in a Fluid-Solid Interaction Problem
summary: We demonstrate existence in the ``large" and uniqueness in the ``small" of equilibrium configurations for the coupled system consisting of a Navier-Stokes fluid interacting with a rigid body subjected to spring forces and restoring moments. The driving mechanism is a uniform, given velocity field of the fluid at large spatial distances from the body. The main difficulty in the proof of the above properties arises from the fact that the body can rotate around a given axis, which produces a highly nonlinear problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了Navier-Stokes流体与受弹簧力和恢复力矩作用的刚体耦合系统大范围存在性和局部唯一性的平衡构型
AI.motivation: 研究流体-刚体耦合系统的平衡构型问题，其中刚体可以绕给定轴旋转，且受到弹簧力和恢复力矩作用，驱动机制是远离物体的大空间距离处流体的均匀给定速度场
AI.techniques: 处理高度非线性问题的分析方法，特别是处理刚体旋转带来的非线性困难，可能涉及不动点定理、能量估计和耦合系统的稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了耦合系统平衡构型的大范围存在性和局部唯一性，即在"大"范围内存在解，在"小"范围内解是唯一的
AI.significance: 为流体-刚体相互作用问题提供了重要的数学理论基础，特别是处理刚体旋转带来的高度非线性问题，对理解耦合系统的平衡态行为有重要意义

title: Existence and non-existence phenomena for nonlinear elliptic equations with $L^1$ data and singular reactions
summary:
We study existence and non-existence of solutions for singular elliptic boundary value problems as \begin{equation}\label{eintro}\begin{cases}\tag{1}
  \displaystyle -Δ_p u+ \frac{a(x)}{u^γ}=μf(x) \ &\text{ in }Ω, \newline
  u>0&\text{ in }Ω, \newline
  u = 0 \ &\text{ on }
  \partialΩ,
  \end{cases} \end{equation} where $Ω$ is a smooth bounded open subset of $\mathbb{R}^N$ ($N\ge 2$), $Δ_p u$ is the $p$-Laplacian with $p>1$, $0<γ\leq 1$, and $a\geq0$ is bounded and non-trivial. For any positive $ f\in L^{1}(Ω)$ we show that problem \eqref{eintro} is solvable for any $μ>μ_0>0$, for some $μ_0$ large enough. As a reciprocal outcome we also show that no finite energy solution exists if $0<μ<μ_{0*}$, for some small $μ_{0*}$.
  This paper extends the celebrated one of J. I. Diaz, J. M. Morel and L. Oswald ([16]) to the case $p\neq2$. Our result is also new for $p=2$ provided the singular term has a critical growth near zero (i.e. $γ=1$).

AI.tldr: 研究带奇异项和p-Laplacian算子的椭圆边值问题解的存在性与非存在性
AI.motivation: 将Diaz-Morel-Oswald关于奇异椭圆问题的经典结果从p=2推广到p≠2的情形，并研究奇异项在零点附近具有临界增长（γ=1）时的新现象
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、比较原理、上下解方法，以及处理奇异非线性项和p-Laplacian算子的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明存在阈值μ₀和μ₀*，使得当μ>μ₀时问题有解，当0<μ<μ₀*时不存在有限能量解
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异椭圆问题的经典理论，为p-Laplacian算子下的奇异问题提供了新的存在性判据，对非线性椭圆方程理论有重要贡献

title: Well-posedness and the Łojasiewicz-Simon inequality in the asymptotic analysis of a nonlinear heat equation with constraints of finite codimension
summary:
We establish the global well-posedness of the $D(A)-$valued strong solution to a nonlinear heat equation with constraints on a \textit{Poincaré domain} $\bO\subset \R^d$ whose boundary is of class $C^2$. Consider the following nonlinear heat equation
  \begin{align*}
  \frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - Δu + |u|^{p-2}u = 0,
  \end{align*}
  projected onto the tangent space $T_u\bM$, where
  $\mathcal{M}:=\left\{u\in L^2(\bO):\|u\|_{L^2(\bO)}=1\right\}$ is a submanifold of $L^2(\bO)$. The nonlinearity exponent satisfies $2\le p < \infty$ for $1\leq d\leq 4$ and $2 \le p \le \frac{2d-4}{d-4}$ for $d \ge 5$. The solution is constrained to lie within $\mathcal{M}$ which encodes the norm-preserving constraint. By modifying the nonlinearity and exploiting the abstract theory for \textit{$m-$accretive }evolution equations, we prove the existence of a global strong solution.
  Using {resolvent-idea } and the \textit{Yosida approximation} method, we derive regularity results. In the asymptotic analysis, $\bO$ is restricted to bounded domains with even $p$
  and $1\le d \le 3$. For any initial data in $D(A) \cap \mathcal{M}$, we apply the \textit{Łojasiewicz-Simon gradient inequality} on a Hilbert submanifold [F. Rupp, \textit{J. Funct. Anal.}, 279(8), 2020], to demonstrate that the unique global strong solution converges in $W^{2,q}(\bO) \cap W^{1,q}_0(\bO)$ to a stationary state, where $2 \le q < \frac{2d}{d + 4 - 4β}$ and $1 < β< \frac{3}{2}$.
  This work proposes an alternative method for establishing the global existence and analyzing long-term behavior of the unique strong solution to an $L^2-$norm preserving nonlinear heat equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有L²范数约束的非线性热方程在Poincaré域上的全局适定性和强解的渐近收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究具有L²范数约束的非线性热方程的全局适定性问题，这类方程在物理和几何流中具有重要应用，特别是在保持能量或质量守恒的系统中
AI.techniques: 使用m-增生演化方程的抽象理论、Yosida逼近方法、解子思想、Łojasiewicz-Simon梯度不等式在Hilbert子流形上的应用
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Poincaré域上建立了全局强解的存在性；2. 证明了强解在特定Sobolev空间中的渐近收敛到稳态解；3. 给出了非线性指数p的容许范围条件
AI.significance: 为具有约束条件的非线性演化方程提供了新的分析方法，将几何流理论中的Łojasiewicz-Simon不等式推广到Hilbert子流形上，对研究范数保持的PDE系统有重要理论意义

title: Optimal Hardy-weights for the Finsler $p$-Dirichlet integral with a potential
summary: Fix an integer $n\geq 2$, an exponent $1<p<\infty$, and a domain $Ω\subseteq\mathbb{R}^{n}$. Let $Ω^{*}\triangleqΩ\setminus\{\hat{x}\}$ where $\hat{x}\inΩ$. Under some further conditions, we construct optimal Hardy-weights for the Finsler $p$-Dirichlet integral $$Q_{0}[φ;Ω^{*}]\triangleq\int_{Ω^{*}}H(x,\nabla φ)^{p}\,\mathrm{d}x\quad \mbox{on}\quad C^{\infty}_{c}(Ω^{*}),$$ and the Finsler $p$-Dirichlet integral with a potential $$Q_{V}[φ;Ω]\triangleq\int_Ω\left(H(x,\nabla φ)^{p}+ V|φ|^{p}\right)\,\mathrm{d}x\quad \mbox{on}\quad C^{\infty}_{c}(Ω),$$where $H(x,\cdot)$ is a family of norms on $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ parameterized by $x\inΩ^{*}$ or $x\inΩ$, respectively, and the potential $V$ lies in a subspace $\widehat{M}^{q}_{\rm loc}(p;Ω)$ of a local Morrey space $M^{q}_{\rm loc}(p;Ω)$.

AI.tldr: 构造了Finsler p-Dirichlet积分及其带势能变体的最优Hardy权重
AI.motivation: 研究Finsler p-Dirichlet积分在奇异点移除或带势能情况下的Hardy不等式，目标是构造最优Hardy权重，这些权重在Hardy型不等式中提供最佳常数
AI.techniques: 使用Finsler几何框架、局部Morrey空间理论、Hardy权重构造方法，以及奇异点移除和势能项的处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 在适当条件下，构造了奇异点移除的Finsler p-Dirichlet积分和带势能Finsler p-Dirichlet积分的最优Hardy权重
AI.significance: 推广了经典Hardy不等式到Finsler几何框架，为非线性椭圆算子的谱分析和临界性理论提供了新工具，在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用

title: Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard system in a $3$D perforated domain with free slip and source term: Existence and homogenization
summary:
We study a diffuse-interface model for a binary incompressible mixture in a periodically perforated porous medium, described by a time-dependent Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard (NSCH) system posed on the pore domain $Ω_p^\varepsilon\subset\mathbb{R}^3$. The microscopic model involves a variable viscosity tensor, a non-conservative source term in the Cahn--Hilliard equation, and mixed boundary conditions: no-slip on the outer boundary and Navier slip with zero tangential stress on the surfaces of the solid inclusions. The capillarity strength $λ^\varepsilon>0$ depends on the microscopic scale $\varepsilon>0$.
  The analysis consists of two main parts. First, for each fixed $\varepsilon>0$, we prove the existence of a weak solution on a finite time interval $(0,T)$ and derive a priori estimates that are uniform with respect to $\varepsilon$ (and $λ^\varepsilon$). Second, we perform the periodic homogenization for the perforated setting, a limit $\varepsilon\to0$. Depending on the limit value $λ$ of the capillarity strength $λ^\varepsilon$, we obtain two distinct effective models: (i) in the vanishing capillarity regime $λ=0$, the limit system is of Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard type, with no macroscopic convection or advection; (ii) in the balanced regime $λ\in(0,+\infty)$, we derive a Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard system with nonlinear convection and advective transport of the phase field at the macroscopic scale. Finally, we establish the convergence of the microscopic free energy to a homogenized energy functional satisfying an analogous dissipation law.

AI.tldr: 研究多孔介质中二元不可压缩混合物的扩散界面模型，通过周期性均匀化分析得到两种不同的有效模型
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质中二元混合物的微观-宏观尺度耦合问题，考虑具有可变粘度张量、非保守源项和混合边界条件的Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard系统，分析毛细管强度对均匀化极限的影响
AI.techniques: 弱解存在性证明、先验估计、周期性均匀化方法、双尺度收敛、能量耗散分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对固定ε证明弱解存在性和ε一致先验估计；2) 根据毛细管强度极限λ得到两种均匀化模型：λ=0时为Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard系统（无宏观对流），λ∈(0,∞)时为Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard系统（含非线性对流）
AI.significance: 建立了多孔介质中两相流扩散界面模型的数学基础，揭示了毛细管效应在均匀化过程中的关键作用，为多尺度两相流模拟提供了理论框架

title: Long-Time Existence and Behavior of Solutions to the Inhomogeneous Kinetic FPU Equation
summary: We study the inhomogeneous kinetic Fermi-Pasta-Ulam (FPU) equation, a nonlinear transport equation describing the evolution of phonon density distributions with four-phonon interactions. The equation combines free transport in physical space with a nonlinear collision operator acting in momentum space and exhibiting structural degeneracies. We develop a functional framework that captures the interplay between spatial transport and the degeneracies arising in the collision operator. A key ingredient of the analysis is a dispersive estimate for the transport flow, which quantifies decay effects generated by spatial propagation. Using this dispersive mechanism, we obtain improved bounds for the nonlinear collision operator and show that small solutions near the vacuum can be propagated on time scales significantly longer than those dictated by conservation laws alone. In particular, dispersion allows one to extend the classical quadratic lifespan to a quartic time scale.

AI.tldr: 建立了非齐次动力学Fermi-Pasta-Ulam方程的小解长时间存在性理论，将经典二次寿命扩展到四次时间尺度。
AI.motivation: 研究描述四声子相互作用的非齐次动力学FPU方程，该方程结合了物理空间的自由输运和动量空间中的非线性碰撞算子，但碰撞算子存在结构退化性，需要处理空间输运与退化性之间的相互作用。
AI.techniques: 发展了捕捉空间输运与碰撞算子退化性相互作用的泛函框架；关键分析工具是输运流的色散估计，量化空间传播产生的衰减效应；利用色散机制改进非线性碰撞算子的估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了真空附近小解可以在比仅由守恒律决定的时间尺度显著更长的时间上传播；具体而言，色散机制允许将经典的二次寿命扩展到四次时间尺度。
AI.significance: 为具有退化碰撞算子的非线性输运方程提供了新的分析框架；展示了色散效应如何克服结构退化性并延长解的存在时间；对理解FPU链等晶格系统的动力学行为有重要意义。

title: Green's Function and Solution Representation for a Boundary Value Problem Involving the Prabhakar Fractional Derivative
summary: We investigate a first boundary value problem for a second-order partial differential equation involving the Prabhakar fractional derivative in time. Using structural properties of the Prabhakar kernel and generalized Mittag-Leffler functions, we reduce the problem to a Volterra type integral equation. This reduction enables the explicit construction of the corresponding Green's function. Based on the obtained Green's function, we derive a closed-form integral representation of the solution and prove its existence and uniqueness. The results extend classical Green-function techniques to a wider class of fractional operators and provide analytical tools for further study of boundary and inverse problems associated with Prabhakar-type fractional differential equations.

AI.tldr: 将Prabhakar分数阶导数边值问题转化为Volterra积分方程，显式构造Green函数并获得解的闭式积分表示
AI.motivation: 研究含Prabhakar时间分数阶导数的二阶偏微分方程的第一边值问题，扩展经典Green函数方法到更广泛的分数阶算子类
AI.techniques: 利用Prabhakar核和广义Mittag-Leffler函数的结构性质，将边值问题化为Volterra型积分方程，显式构造Green函数
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Prabhakar分数阶导数边值问题的Green函数显式表达式，得到解的闭式积分表示，并证明了解的存在唯一性
AI.significance: 将经典Green函数技术推广到Prabhakar型分数阶微分方程，为研究相关边值问题和反问题提供解析工具

title: Operational Calculus for the nth-Level Prabhakar Type Fractional Derivative with Applications
summary: This study investigates the nth-level Prabhakar fractional derivative, a generalization encompassing some well-known fractional derivatives. We establish its fundamental properties, particularly its relationship with the corresponding Prabhakar fractional integral. Furthermore, we develop Mikusinski-type operational calculus for this derivative, providing a framework for solving differential equations involving this operator. To illustrate its application, we present analytical solutions of two problems: a fractional order ordinary differential equation and the time fractional heat equation, both of which include the nth-level Prabhakar derivative.

AI.tldr: 建立了n级Prabhakar分数阶导数的基本性质及其与相应积分的对偶关系，并发展了Mikusinski型运算微积分用于求解包含该算子的微分方程。
AI.motivation: 研究n级Prabhakar分数阶导数这一推广了多种已知分数阶导数的算子，建立其理论基础并发展相应的运算微积分方法，以解决包含该算子的微分方程。
AI.techniques: 分数阶微积分理论、Prabhakar函数性质分析、Mikusinski型运算微积分构建、分数阶微分方程解析求解方法。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了n级Prabhakar分数阶导数的基本性质，特别是与相应Prabhakar分数阶积分的对偶关系；发展了该导数的Mikusinski型运算微积分框架；给出了包含该算子的分数阶常微分方程和时分数阶热方程的解析解。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶微积分理论，为包含广义分数阶导数的微分方程提供了系统求解方法，在分数阶建模和复杂系统分析中具有重要应用价值。

title: Non-Algebraic Decay for Solutions to the Navier-Stokes Equations
summary: Around forty years ago, Michael Wiegner provided, in a seminal paper, sharp algebraic decay rates for solutions of the Navier--Stokes equations, showing that these solutions behave asymptotically like the solutions of the heat equation with the same data as $t\to+\infty$, in the $L^2$-norm, up to some critical decay rate. In the present paper, we close a gap that appears in the conclusion of Wiegner's theorem in the 2D case, for solutions with non-algebraic decay rate.

AI.tldr: 填补了Wiegner关于Navier-Stokes方程解衰减率定理在二维非代数衰减情况下的理论缺口
AI.motivation: 四十年前Michael Wiegner在Navier-Stokes方程解的代数衰减率方面做出了开创性工作，证明了在临界衰减率范围内，Navier-Stokes解在$L^2$范数下渐近于具有相同初值的热方程解。然而在二维情况下，对于非代数衰减率的解，Wiegner定理的结论存在理论缺口。
AI.techniques: Navier-Stokes方程渐近分析，衰减率估计，$L^2$范数比较，热方程解的渐近行为分析，二维流体力学特殊性质分析
AI.main_theorems: 填补了Wiegner定理在二维Navier-Stokes方程非代数衰减情况下的理论缺口，完善了Navier-Stokes解与热方程解在$t\to+\infty$时的渐近等价性结论
AI.significance: 完善了Navier-Stokes方程长时间行为理论，为二维流体力学解的渐近分析提供了更完整的理论框架，对理解不可压缩流体长时间演化行为有重要意义

title: Large time behavior of the solution to the Cauchy problem for the discrete p-Laplacian with density on infinite graphs
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem for the nonstationary discrete p-Laplacian with inhomogeneous density \r{ho}(x) on an infinite graph which supports the Sobolev inequality. For nonnegative solutions when p > 2, we prove the precise rate of stabilization in time, provided \r{ho}(x) is a non-power function. When p > 2 and \r{ho}(x) goes to zero fast enough, we prove the universal bound. Our technique relies on suitable energy inequalities and a new embedding result.

AI.tldr: 研究了无限图上非平稳离散p-Laplacian方程在非幂密度函数下的精确时间稳定化速率和普适界
AI.motivation: 研究无限图上具有非齐次密度ρ(x)的非平稳离散p-Laplacian方程的Cauchy问题，探索解在时间上的稳定化行为，特别关注当密度函数为非幂函数时的精确衰减速率
AI.techniques: 使用合适的能量不等式和新的嵌入结果，结合Sobolev不等式和离散p-Laplacian理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当p>2且ρ(x)为非幂函数时，非负解的精确时间稳定化速率；2. 当p>2且ρ(x)衰减足够快时的普适界
AI.significance: 扩展了离散p-Laplacian方程在无限图上的理论，为具有非齐次密度的非线性演化方程提供了新的稳定化结果，在离散分析和图上的偏微分方程理论中有重要应用
